name: Anar-Coralmoss
personality: Equal parts propeller-beanie-wearing and formidable, this capybara's dead-pixel eyes ensure chaos is not a bug in its personality — it's the primary feature. Light bends around it slightly — or perhaps that's just the reflection off a passing test run. Anar-Coralmoss logs nothing, infers everything, fixes less; whatever you're using, it will work alongside it without complaint.
